title: More Lights
description: Create a new atmosphere with new lamps!
body:
# 📰 〡 Presentation

**Create a new atmosphere** with new 💡 **lamps**!
Modern lighting, outdoor lighting, and much more...

One is redstone-reactive. Another lights up at night, when rainy and when stormy. And another is on all the time with a slab variant.

![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83ad6e6619696b36416f88682218404bf2566efd.png)
